summary: There is no evidence that the NF EN 13727 standard has been improved to address bactericidal efficacy in the presence of interfering substances. Available studies focus only on solution formulations without assessing real-world interferences or standard revisions accordingly.

Available studies focus only on solution formulations without assessing real-world interferences or standard revisions accordingly.. Answer choice: B
